breakthrough: add_gen = 2n (was 11n). Construction: LEDIV(x, DEML(y,1)) = x+y for all real x,y in 2 nodes.

affected_equations.name: ELO Rating System (full update)
affected_equations.add_gen_location: add_gen(R_old, K*(S-E)) in rating update — K*(S-E) is signed
affected_equations.breakdown_new: sub=2n + div=2n + pow=3n + add_pos=3n + recip=1n + sub=2n + mul=2n + add=2n = 17n

affected_equations.name: Nash Equilibrium (2x2 Mixed Strategy, honest)
affected_equations.add_gen_location: add_gen(result_abc, d) in denominator — (a-b-c+d) sign not guaranteed

affected_equations.name: Henderson-Hasselbalch (general form)
affected_equations.add_gen_location: add_gen(pKa, log_ratio) — log_ratio can be positive or negative
affected_equations.note: Near-pKa approximation (8n, no add_gen) is unchanged

affected_equations.name: Reaction Free Energy dG
affected_equations.add_gen_location: add_gen(dG_std, RT*lnQ) — RT*ln(Q) positive when Q>1, negative when Q<1

affected_equations.name: KL Divergence (N-term)
affected_equations.add_gen_location: Each of (N-1) additions between mixed-sign terms p_i*ln(p_i/q_i)

affected_equations.name: DCF NPV (mixed cash flows)
affected_equations.formula: NPV = sum_i CF_i / (1+r)^i  where CF_i can be positive or negative
affected_equations.add_gen_location: Each of (N-1) additions — mixed cash flows (initial investment negative, returns positive)
affected_equations.note: Per-term: mul(CF_i, recip(pow(1+r,i)))=6n. Additions: add=2n each. Total: 6N + 2(N-1) = 8N-2... recalculate with exact per-term from econ_1.

affected_equations.name: Expected Value (mixed-sign outcomes)
affected_equations.formula: E[X] = sum_i x_i * P(x_i) where x_i can be negative (losses)
affected_equations.add_gen_location: When outcome x_i includes negative values (e.g., financial losses)
affected_equations.note: Non-negative outcomes already used add_pos=3n → new cost is 2n per add; per-term 2n; 2N+2(N-1)=4N-2

affected_equations.name: Jensen-Shannon Divergence (N-term)
affected_equations.savings: proportional to add_gen count in expansion

total_savings_identified: 9n per add_gen replacement; KL divergence alone saves 9*(N-1)n for N-outcome distribution

scaling_law_update.saving_vs_add_gen: 9*N - 9 = 9*(N-1) nodes saved for N-term signed sum
scaling_law_update.note: The positive/general domain split is eliminated. All linear sums — positive or mixed-sign — now use add=2n.

add_gen_conjecture_status.was: OPEN CONJECTURE (add_gen_11n_conjecture.json): 11n was best known, 5n structural lower bound, 11n conjectured tight
add_gen_conjecture_status.now: RESOLVED — 2n is achievable. The 5n structural argument had a gap: it assumed ln of inputs was required. The LEDIV+DEML construction avoids taking ln of any input.
add_gen_conjecture_status.resolution: LEDIV(x, DEML(y,1)) uses only exp(x), exp(-y), and ln(exp(x)/exp(-y)) — no ln of raw input x or y

info_theory_key_insight_update.old_insight: Sign-definiteness of summands determines cost: add_pos(3n) vs add_gen(11n). KL forces add_gen — explains 2x cost ratio vs Shannon.
info_theory_key_insight_update.new_insight: Sign-definiteness is NO LONGER the cost driver. KL divergence uses add=2n just like Shannon. The 2x cost ratio collapses: KL = 7N-2, Shannon = 8N-3. KL is now CHEAPER per-term structure than Shannon (7 vs 8 per term, because Shannon needs neg(2n) per term to restructure).
